item.title: How Alcohol Affects GABA Receptors
item.description: A simple explanation of how alcohol interacts with GABA receptors in the brain, which can contribute to feelings of relaxation, slowed activity, and sleepiness.

media:content.media:title: How Alcohol Affects GABA Receptors
media:content.media:description: A simple explanation of how alcohol interacts with GABA receptors in the brain, which can contribute to feelings of relaxation, slowed activity, and sleepiness.

item.title: ADHD and the challenge of starting tasks
item.description: ADHD can affect focus and task initiation, including difficulty responding to a single email.

media:content.media:title: ADHD and the challenge of starting tasks
media:content.media:description: ADHD can affect focus and task initiation, including difficulty responding to a single email.

item.title: Should ADHD Have a Different Name?
item.description: ADHD affects more than just attention, which is why some experts and creators debate whether the current name truly reflects the condition. This explores alternative ways people describe it.

media:content.media:title: Should ADHD Have a Different Name?
media:content.media:description: ADHD affects more than just attention, which is why some experts and creators debate whether the current name truly reflects the condition. This explores alternative ways people describe it.
